name: wildrobot_walk_forward_v002
notes: real retarget v1 from local GMR source (walking_slow01). 8-DOF lower-body source mapped to 19-actuator WildRobot via per-frame least_squares foot-target feasibility solve with joint bounds, knee-floor regularization, and frame-to-frame smoothness. This v1 pass adapts an already WildRobot-retargeted source clip rather than performing a full de novo retarget.
